title: High stakes battle in Manjhi as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Manjhi. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Manjhi
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Manjhi constituency.

title: Political rally in Manjhi draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Manjhi promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Manjhi has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.
